name: golang-github-go-logr-logr-dev
title: golang-github-go-logr-logr-dev
description:
simple logging interface for Go (library)
This package offers a purely abstract interface, based on these ideas
but with a few twists.  Code can depend on just this interface and
have the actual logging implementation be injected from callers.
Ideally only main() knows what logging implementation is being used.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-go-logr-logr-dev because simple logging interface for Go (library).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-go-logr-logr-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-go-logr-logr-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-go-logr-logr-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
